verses.text: God bids him judge 'the bloody city' and show all her abominations — bloodshed and idols — for her day is come. Sin named openly. The faithful messenger does not flatter but exposes.
God bids him judge 'the bloody city' and show all her abominations — bloodshed and idols — for her day is come. Sin named openly. The faithful messenger does not flatter but exposes.

God bids him judge 'the bloody city' and show all her abominations — bloodshed and idols — for her day is come. Sin named openly. The faithful messenger does not flatter but exposes.
Her princes shed blood, despise parents, oppress the stranger, and wrong the fatherless. Justice perverted. When rulers trample the weak, the whole society is corrupt.
Her princes shed blood, despise parents, oppress the stranger, and wrong the fatherless. Justice perverted. When rulers trample the weak, the whole society is corrupt.

Her princes shed blood, despise parents, oppress the stranger, and wrong the fatherless. Justice perverted. When rulers trample the weak, the whole society is corrupt.
They commit lewdness, take usury, and 'hast forgotten me, saith the Lord GOD.' Greed and lust. The root of every crime is the forgetting of God.
They commit lewdness, take usury, and 'hast forgotten me, saith the Lord GOD.' Greed and lust. The root of every crime is the forgetting of God.
They commit lewdness, take usury, and 'hast forgotten me, saith the Lord GOD.' Greed and lust. The root of every crime is the forgetting of God.
God smites His hand at their dishonest gain; can their heart endure the day He deals with them? He will scatter them. Reckoning comes. Ill-gotten gain cannot stand before God's judgment.
God smites His hand at their dishonest gain; can their heart endure the day He deals with them? He will scatter them. Reckoning comes. Ill-gotten gain cannot stand before God's judgment.

Israel has become dross — brass, tin, iron, lead — in God's furnace. Worthless mixture. A people meant to be pure silver has turned to refuse.
Israel has become dross — brass, tin, iron, lead — in God's furnace. Worthless mixture. A people meant to be pure silver has turned to refuse.
He will gather them into the city as into a furnace and melt them in His fury. Refining by fire. Judgment burns away what sin has made them.
He will gather them into the city as into a furnace and melt them in His fury. Refining by fire. Judgment burns away what sin has made them.

Her prophets are like a roaring lion ravening the prey, devouring souls and seizing treasure. Predatory leaders. False shepherds prey on the very flock they should feed.
Her prophets are like a roaring lion ravening the prey, devouring souls and seizing treasure. Predatory leaders. False shepherds prey on the very flock they should feed.
Her prophets are like a roaring lion ravening the prey, devouring souls and seizing treasure. Predatory leaders. False shepherds prey on the very flock they should feed.
Her priests violate God's law, her princes are wolves, and her prophets daub with 'untempered morter.' Every order corrupt. When all the guides fail, the people are utterly lost.
Her priests violate God's law, her princes are wolves, and her prophets daub with 'untempered morter.' Every order corrupt. When all the guides fail, the people are utterly lost.
Her priests violate God's law, her princes are wolves, and her prophets daub with 'untempered morter.' Every order corrupt. When all the guides fail, the people are utterly lost.
The people oppress the poor; God 'sought for a man... that should... stand in the gap... but I found none.' No intercessor. The lack of one righteous pleader hastened the judgment.
